commit.message: chore:this sounded too shit so changed it

fix: enhance error page handling and security validation

- Add renderErrorPage handler for consistent error page rendering
- Improve SESSION_SECRET validation in production environment
- Redirect unauthenticated users from error pages to login
- Integrate errorPageHandler and notFoundHandler middleware
- Add error pages for desktop and mobile viewports
- Fix IP ban error response to use renderErrorPage
- Clean up error handling middleware implementation
Fix: fix incorrect resource info being sent to node due to mb and gb and percentage and cores count
Fix : add nonce="<%- nonce %> to improve security in all script tags  update app.ts to include this and add python patch to approve pnpm builds and add uuid explicit install to daemon
Fix: who messed up the panel this much phew finally fixed some major issues
